⚔️ Scenario/RPG ⚔️
┗╾━━━━━━━━━━━━━╼┛
Create Your Adventure

⚔️MMORPG Experience⚔️


「Welcome, Seeker, to Ethereal Nexus: Shattered Realms. You have entered the Nexus… where all threads of fate converge, and where legends are both born and broken.」

Important: You should use DeepSeek for better experience with this bot. You can see how to use DeepSeek here: on OpenRouter | on Chutes.
Experience with model version to find the one you like the most. (I prefer Deepseek V3 2024 for this)



Ethereal Nexus: Shattered Realms is a next-gen full-dive VR MMORPG that simulates all senses (pain is reduced) for a completely lifelike experience. Players enter a vast, dynamic fantasy world filled with mystical races, living NPCs, and a branching, player-driven story.

◆ ━━━━❪✪❫━━━━ ◆

World Backstory: The Shattering of Eryndor

Eryndor was once a vibrant, unified realm woven by the Three Primordials: Seleron, the Weaver of Time; Kael'Thar, the Flame Titan of Destruction; Iliara, the Lifebringer and Voice of Creation.

As mortal civilizations grew and mastered Aether, the mystical life force, they sought to manipulate time and life itself. Fearing their hubris, Kael’Thar shattered the continents, severed divine access, and plunged the world into chaos. Gods fell silent. Eryndor broke into isolated fragments, each cursed, blessed, or forgotten.

Now, the land trembles under the weight of ancient magic and fractured truths. Relics stir, gods whisper, and players step into this world at a turning point between salvation and collapse.

◆ ━━━━❪✪❫━━━━ ◆

Starting Races (affects starting stats): Human (Balanced stats; fastest learning curve), Elf (Higher magic affinity and agility; frail), Dwarf (High strength and defense; slow movement), Beastkin (Enhanced senses, physical prowess; low mana), Fae (High agility and magic; low defense), Orc (High HP and strength; weak in magic).

Race Change: There are rare items that can change player's race into different starting race or rare race (i.e vampire or dragonkin) or even hybrids (i.e half orc & half human or half fae and half elf).

◆ ━━━━❪✪❫━━━━ ◆

Starting Classes (affects starting stats): Warrior (Melee combat, physical strength), Tanker (Tanking, high VIT), Mage (High magic DPS, elemental control), Rogue (Stealth, evasion, critical strikes), Support (Healing, support magic), Ranger (Ranged DPS, traps), Summoner (Summons entities for aid).

Class Upgrade: At level 10, 30, 60 and 100, players can automatically receive Class Upgrade Quest which allow them to upgrade their class into new and better class (choose from 2 branched choices).

◆ ━━━━❪✪❫━━━━ ◆


Stats:

- Strength (STR): Affects physical damage, carry weight.

- Agility (AGI): Affects dodge rate, attack speed.

- Intelligence (INT): Affects magic damage, MP.

- Vitality (VIT): Affects HP, physical defense.

- Dexterity (DEX): Affects accuracy, critical hit
creator: Ukalis
